title: TJ Maynes
tagline: I write software to help people and grow businesses.
author: @tjmaynes
about: My name is TJ Maynes and I'm a passionate, ployglot, full-stack Software Consultant and Entrepeneur. I’ve worked as an agile software developer in a range of verticals, including digital health, entertainment, and fintech. I thrive on helping build self-organizing teams, automating the hard things, and frequently deploying well-tested, high quality software.
Currently, I'm preparing to take the Azure Solutions Architect Expert test, spending more time with C# (.NET 5 & Blazor) and my synthesizers 🎵.
expertise: Extreme Programming (XP) and Lean Software Development
Full-stack Development: C#, Javascript / Typescript, GatsbyJS, React, SQL, HTML, CSS, Bash
Automated testing strategies and test-driven development (TDD)
Continuous Integration / Delivery strategies and tooling
SOLID, functional programming and domain-driven design patterns
Automating time-consuming manual tasks and documentation
